reviews.review_description: This game used to be good, and VERY VERY fun in V1. But now it’s just horrible and boring, horror mode sucks now, devs lie to everyone saying “oh new version soon!” And it never happens and honestly I don’t care anymore, I played this game almost EVERY SINGLE DAY, when it was actually playable, now I’ve honestly just forgotten about it, but yeah this game fell off BADLY if you want people to actually play the game, for once just listen to the players and bring back v1 and old player model, especially old movement, who thought bouncy movement was good? It’s trash, bring v1 back.

My friend and I LOVED it. The unique movement was great as well. I also love how EVERYTHING was unique. My favorite spot is definitely the frozen lake lol. Although I have wondered why it's still on the Christmas update, I'm here to answer that. The person who ran this game has stopped being paid because the owner has fully quit on Capuchin and has been working on a side project. That being said, no updates are coming.
I have no freaking idea why the owner is dang lazy.not only did bro change the ENTIER game,but he keeps teasing the long-awaited “V3” update which will NEVER come out.this is how you kill a game.

I know the Dev team is working on ￼V3 right now but it needs a update.

Each time you Ignore this￼ review, You lose a star review￼.

So I Started Playing This Game Few Years Back When V1 Was The best versions of all especially with horror and the best moments with everyone laughing and screaming in level 2 can't you developers just give us V1 back please it's not that hard and plus you guys have a copy of it I know it since everyone does
This game was my number one favorite game until it fell down badly. People being mean or Annoying and the horror game mode is now dookie. WE NEED BETTER UPDATES.
i like this game but you made music on youtube and i want it to be in the game so please update the game and it's still on the christmas update

2022 Capuchin. Thank you, capuchin. For the memories you have given me. For the fun I had with my friends, and even by myself. Thank you for letting me laugh of joy every time I hopped on the game, and smile of happiness every time I hopped off knowing I’d play again tomorrow. Thank you for giving me the comfort of playing Vr. Thank you for getting me so excited to hop on every time after school and play with my friends. I still think about those days, you know? But life keeps going. This game means so much to me, and I’m so grateful I got to experience it back then. Thank you, capuchin. Thank you. Take me back.

I used to play in 2022 June 7 before it got hacked I loved this game then got hacked and I hated my life when it got shut down and it was my favorite game AND NOW ITS BACK I FRIKING LOVE U GUYS TY FOR BRINGING IT BACK I CRYED WHY I PLAY AGIAN I LOVE YOU VERE VERY VERY MUCH TY I love this game

Dear Capuchin,

I still think about you sometimes, especially when I remember how 2022 felt. Back then, everything moved slower, and the days felt longer in the best way. Putting on the VR headset after school felt like stepping into a different world—one where nothing else mattered. For those hours, it was just me, the game, and that familiar feeling of excitement I don’t get as often anymore.

I miss the moment I finally got the Nerf gun, how proud I felt running around and shooting the monsters like I had earned my place there. It wasn’t just about winning or grinding—it was about the feeling of being completely absorbed. The sounds, the movement, the rush of chasing and being chased all blended together into something unforgettable. I’d tell myself I’d play for a little while, and suddenly hours were gone, the sun already set outside my room.

What really hurts is how natural it all felt. Every day after school followed the same comforting routine: rush home, load into Capuchin, and lose myself until night. No pressure, no worries about the future—just fun, laughter, and repetition that somehow never got boring. Those moments are frozen in my memory now, and even though time keeps moving forward, part of me will always miss that version of life. You weren’t just a game—you were a feeling, and I wish I could go back to it just one more time.

Capuchin even though it is not what it used to be it is still one of the best vr games oat, I couldn’t imagine what my life would be like back in 2022 with me and my 3 friends never getting board over the game we loved. These hackers took away happiness to thousands of people who loved this game. Capuchin you made me and my friends happy and for that I thank you.

reviews.review_title: Was good but its buns now
reviews.review_description: I just miss the old capuchin. When i could actually move without the god forsaken 100x intensity jiggle physics. What in gods green earth was going through the developers heads when they decided to make it so that every time you took a step you had to bounce 20 times before you finally came to a stop. Not to mention how buns the horror feature is now. That was the only good part of the game and now nb plays it anymore because it sucks and we cant move. Like seriously how hard was it to just bring back the old game without incredible gasifying us every time we took a step. The lack of players in the chopped tung tung game should be a sign that you guys are doing something wrong.

Oh boy oh boy where did the time go staying up until 1 am to play this game running back home from school to get on this my friends this game made me happy I had family losses and this game was the only thing keeping me going I loved level 2 and grandpa skittles/ cup cake this game was my everything and I would do anything to go back in time and play it

This game is insane I love the music in the loading screen but I have a couple of concerns. Public lobbies barely have anyone in it and horror barely has anyone playing it. I heard about the CapuLegacy game that came out at 1:00 today, but for some odd reason it still hasn’t popped up on meta store! Also the game is kinda falling apart you know? The space launcher doesn’t work, zero gravity is broken, nobody plays horror, and there isn’t that much to do compared to the last version of the game. I really miss when this game was still popular but it’s still super fun but I just think the game is falling apart. Still a really fun game!
The game was one my my absolute favorites in all gorrila tag fan makes and seeing it dead is just sad.

reviews.review_title: Good, but worse than the old version.
reviews.review_description: Back in 2022 and 2023, i would play this with my friend and brother all the time, back when it was really good. Its not that bad now, but the movement is what ruins it. The bouncy movement is terrible, and there isn't even a movement option to change it back to the og movement. (yes, ik there are movement options, but it doesn't feel any different each option.) So overall i like the game, it was just better before the remake. (and don't just side with me for the ones who read this, go with your opinion on the game. If you like it, you can like it. This is just my opinion.)
